item.title: Welcome to my homepage!
item.description: Shortbio Research Interests My main research interests include spatial database management and graph database. I am particularly interested in Querying geo-tagged stream (ICDE’18) Spatial data visualization (SIGMOD’18) Efficient processing of spatial queries (SIGMOD’16, VLDB’16) Graph and social data analysis (SIGMOD’14, TKDE’16, ICDE’17) Publication SURGE: Continuous detection of bursty regions over a stream of spatial objects. Kaiyu Feng, Tao Guo, Gao Cong, Sourav S. Bhowmick, Shuai Ma. ICDE 2018 (short) Efficient selection of geospatial data on maps for interactive visualized exploration.
